message:
fix: use net.SplitHostPort for IPv6-safe HTTP URL parsing (bd-7dqc)

The old code used strings.Contains(host, ":") to detect an explicit port,
which incorrectly matched IPv6 addresses like [::1]. Extract address
resolution into httpURLToTCPAddr using net.SplitHostPort, and add tests
covering IPv4, IPv6 with/without ports, HTTP and HTTPS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/slate
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
